title: hieracium pilosella subsp. inalpestriforme
intro: Hieracium pilosella subsp. inalpestriforme, also known as a variant of the lesser hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and polyphenols. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, Hieracium pilosella subsp. inalpestriforme is often used as a tea, tincture, or infusement to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
